inline_comments.message: I think there is a missing space here.

What is the reason for version pinning (https://helm.sh/docs/chart_best_practices/#versions)?

Do changes after 1.6.8 (https://github.com/helm/charts/commit/1063eeedc808b0c08c22eefaaea295e916c1a0e2) mess anything up?

If I'm not mistaken, this would allow nginx-ingress up to 1.7 (https://github.com/Masterminds/semver#tilde-range-comparisons-patch)

I realize development of this chart is pretty fast-paced (it's already v1.10.2 as of writing this comment - https://github.com/helm/charts/commits/master/stable/nginx-ingress/Chart.yaml)

Maybe this constraint could be further relaxed in future patches, depending on direction of introduced changes in the chart. Let me know what you think
